0010011011101011 1000110100001010 0 -> sum: 1011001111110101, cout: 0
0110001000101011 1001000011100100 1 -> sum: 1111001100010000, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
